product_overview: Antigravity Life OS is an offline-first, gamified habit and physiological tracker that awards Aura Points (AP) for daily activities, tracks streak multipliers, and lets users redeem AP for real-world rewards. The app surfaces daily progress, historical heatmaps/charts, a global leaderboard, and an offline-first sync to keep user data consistent across sessions.
core_goals: Let users track and mark daily habits, workouts, study, sleep, nutrition and mood to earn Aura Points.
Visualize daily progress and historical performance through a dashboard, heatmap and charts.
Grow streaks and multipliers by maintaining consecutive activity and see their effect on AP earned.
Allow users to redeem accrued Aura Points for real-world rewards in the shop.
Provide a leaderboard to compare AP with other users and view personal rank.
Enable users to configure profile and task preferences and keep data synced offline-first.

features.name: Authentication (Login & Signup)
features.description: Access the app by signing up or logging in with email and password; new users set a player name and are taken into the app with their profile created.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Enter email and password (min 8 chars) -> Submit credentials to sign in -> Be redirected to /dashboard -> See dashboard loaded with personalized greeting

Navigate to /auth -> Enter email and password (min 8 chars) -> Submit credentials to sign up -> Confirm or edit suggested player name -> Be redirected to /dashboard -> See new profile created with initial AP and streak values
Navigate to /auth -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit credentials -> See an inline error message and remain on /auth

features.name: Dashboard Progress & Daily Tracker
features.description: View today's score, XP bar, heatmap and charts; mark daily tasks complete to earn AP and influence streaks and multipliers.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See today's greeting, AP counter, XP bar, heatmap and activity chart -> Mark a daily task complete -> Observe today's score and XP bar increase -> See heatmap and chart update to reflect the activity

Navigate to /dashboard -> Complete multiple category tasks (workout, study, nutrition, sleep, mood) -> Observe category progress meters fill and daily AP increase toward daily caps -> See updated total Aura Points reflected in the AP counter
Navigate to /dashboard -> Mark a permanent daily task incomplete for the day (skip) -> Observe streak and multiplier recalculation reflected in the UI

features.name: Shop Redemption
features.description: Browse rewards and redeem them using accrued Aura Points; successful redemptions deduct AP and record the transaction in history.
user_flows: Navigate to /shop -> See current Aura Points balance and reward catalog -> Choose a reward with cost within your balance -> Confirm redemption -> See AP balance decrease and redemption recorded in history -> See success notification
Navigate to /shop -> See current Aura Points balance -> Select a reward that costs more than your balance -> Attempt to redeem -> See an insufficient points alert and no change to AP balance

features.name: Leaderboard
features.description: View a ranked list of users ordered by total Aura Points and see your own rank highlighted.
user_flows: Navigate to /leaderboard -> See a list of users ordered by total Aura Points (highest first) -> Scan the list to view top ranks and their AP values -> Locate your row and see your rank tag
Navigate to /leaderboard -> Observe leaderboard labels change based on position (e.g., top titles) -> Note your position relative to other users

features.name: Calendar & History
features.description: Inspect historical performance via a calendar heatmap and open a specific day's summary to review activity and AP logs.
user_flows: Navigate to /calendar -> See a calendar heatmap of past performance and AP history overview -> Select a specific date in the calendar -> See that day's activity summary and AP log entries
Navigate to /calendar -> Scan recent weeks to identify streaks and gaps -> Use the visual cues to plan next-day activities

features.name: Settings & Task Management
features.description: Configure profile and app preferences and manage tasks (add, edit, archive) so the dashboard reflects current priorities.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> View profile and app preferences -> Update display name or preferences -> Save changes -> See updated profile reflected across the app
Navigate to /settings -> Open task manager -> Add a new task or edit an existing task's settings -> Save changes -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See the new or updated task appear in the daily tracker

routes.description: Main user dashboard showing daily tracker progress, XP bar, heatmap, chart
Shop to redeem Aura Points for real-world rewards

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Login or register to access the tracker

features.name: Dashboard Progress
features.description: Track daily stats, mark tasks complete, view dynamic progress bars
user_interactions: Click MARK DONE on daily tasks

features.name: Shop Redemption
user_interactions: Click REDEEM on Amazon or Netflix card
